hook.summary: Re-engagement message featuring a lineup of mechs and celebratory confetti.
hook.visual_action: A group of mechs stands in a dark environment as 3D text 'We miss you!' drops into the frame with confetti.

scene_flow: Initial shot of a diverse lineup of mechs standing in a dark, starry environment.
3D animated text 'We miss you!' drops into the center of the frame accompanied by falling confetti.
A green 'Comeback' button appears at the bottom of the screen to encourage player return.
The video transitions to a TikTok end card showing the creator's handle.
audience_proxy: Lapsed players of mobile mech combat games who have recently stopped playing.
